title: MLSC Orientation — New Members
body: Welcome session for new chapter members in the MAC Auditorium. Bring your student ID.

title: Room change — UCS027
body: Wednesday's UCS027 lecture moves from G312 to G407 until further notice.

title: Mid-Sem schedule released
body: Tentative schedule is up on the academic portal. Check the Exam Dates card for the highlights.
